title: Weekly Eval Review
summary: A standing review of quality drift, regressions, latency movement, and release readiness for AI workflows.

steps.title: Review eval deltas
steps.description: Compare this week's scores against the prior baseline and identify any meaningful regression or unexplained jump.

steps.title: Inspect runtime incidents
steps.description: Walk through the highest-severity failures and decide whether the issue belongs to prompts, retrieval, routing, tooling, or product scope.

steps.title: Set release posture
steps.description: Choose ship, hold, or partial rollout and document the evidence behind the choice.

whenToImplement: As soon as an AI workflow can change faster than manual QA can safely track.
delegationNotes: An analyst or junior engineer can prepare the pack, but a technical owner should make the release call.
automationNotes: Automate report generation and trace collection so the meeting focuses on judgment, not data gathering.
